narrative:
Cols 69-I (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,132 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.5%, a clear Republican lean of 6.4 percentage points.
